name: RPlog_Selene_Day_Space_Battle_Royal
title: Selene Day Space Battle Royal
summary: As one of the final events of Selene Day over the Imperial capital, a friendly free-for-all dogfight is staged for Grand Admiral Kreldin and a holonet audience, framed by a pompous official's speeches about the New Order's rebirth. A mix of TIE Interceptors and other fighters tear into one another the moment the green light drops, with the skilled Major Jal'Dana "Rall" in her white TIE singling out Adam Shadow's crimson Z-100 Centurion and methodically dismantling it despite his astromech's repairs, while the brash pilot Wolf racks up easy kills. As the field thins to two Imperials, Jal'Dana faces her old wingman Wolf in a swift head-to-head duel; recognizing he cannot match her, Wolf gracefully concedes second place. Jal'Dana is declared the victor amid effusive media praise as support ships move in to recover the disabled fighters.
